title: lilium platyphyllum
intro: Lilium platyphyllum, also known as the Chinese Tiger Lily, is a species of lily native to China and India, characterized by its vibrant orange flowers and flat leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lilium platyphyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to menstrual cramps and digestive problems.
